jobs.job_title: Manufacturing Tooling Engineer I: CNC & Fixture Design
jobs.description: A leading semiconductor company in California is looking for a Manufacturing Engineer I to bridge design and production. This role entails hands-on experience with CNC machinery to create tooling and fixtures, troubleshooting production challenges, and optimizing designs for efficiency and reliability. The preferred candidate will have a BS in Mechanical Engineering, familiarity with SolidWorks and CNC programming, and 0-2.5 years of relevant experience. Competitive pay and benefits are offered.

The Manufacturing Engineer I (ME I) applies the knowledge of engineering principles to support the production of curtainwall systems and components. Under close supervision, the ME I learns and supports manufacturing processes through review and integration within all departments, including production, design and engineering, operations, logistics, and field installation. The ME I provides production support through review and analysis of curtain wall design, assembly, and manufacturing tooling.

The Bay Area Air Quality Management District (Air District) is a regional government agency, committed to achieving clean air to protect the public's health and the environment. The Air District accomplishes this goal through regulation of industrial facilities and various outreach and incentive programs designed to encourage clean air choices.

Job Title

At Wolfspeed, we do amazing things in a human way.

We know that the achievements of our organization are due to the passion, hard work and creativity of our employees.
